- `nums[p...q] = nums[2...3] = [-1, -3]` 严格递减 (`-1 > -3`)。

- `nums[q...r] = nums[2...3] = [2, 7]` 严格递增 (`2 < 7`)。
- 和 = `1 + 4 + 2 + 7 = 14`。

 

**提示:**

  n = nums.length
  max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

  # Precompute for each position the longest increasing sequence ending at that position
  inc_left = Array.new(n, 0)
  inc_left[0] = 1
  for i in 1..n-1
    inc_left[i] = 1
    if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
      inc_left[i] = inc_left[i-1] + 1
    end
  end

  # Precompute for each position the longest decreasing sequence starting at that position
  dec_right = Array.new(n, 0)
  dec_right[n-1] = 1
  for i in (n-2).downto(0)
    dec_right[i] = 1
    if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
      dec_right[i] = dec_right[i+1] + 1
    end
  end

  # Precompute for each position the longest increasing sequence starting at that position
  inc_right = Array.new(n, 0)
  inc_right[n-1] = 1
  for i in (n-2).downto(0)
    inc_right[i] = 1
    if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
      inc_right[i] = inc_right[i+1] + 1
    end
  end

  # Precompute for each position the longest decreasing sequence ending at that position
  dec_left = Array.new(n, 0)
  dec_left[0] = 1
  for i in 1..n-1
    dec_left[i] = 1
    if nums[i] < nums[i-1]
      dec_left[i] = dec_left[i-1] + 1
    end
  end

  # Check all possible triplets (l, p, q, r)
  for l in 0..n-4
    for p in l+1..n-3
      if nums[p] <= nums[p-1]
        next
      end
      for q in p+1..n-2
        if nums[q] >= nums[q-1]
          next
        end
        for r in q+1..n-1
          if nums[r] <= nums[r-1]
            next
          end
          # Check if the entire subarray is a valid 3-part subarray
          if inc_left[p] > 1 && dec_right[q] > 1 && inc_right[q] > 1
            sum = nums[l..r].sum
            max_sum = [max_sum, sum].max
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end

  max_sum
end
